reason: sqlite3.OperationalError: unable to open database file (FUSE/sandbox issue). The candidate_series and dossier files are accessible, but data/politics.db cannot be opened from this Linux mount; consistency requires joining politicians x politician_events x events and inserting into consistency_scores. Recommend running this brief Windows-side, where the DB is healthy.
next_step_recommended: Run `python main.py cowork-queue` Windows-side, then `python main.py score-consistency 2026-05-17` from the Windows venv.
